task_completion.visual_evidence: The document 'HR Policy 2024 Draft' (or 'HR-Policy-2024-Draft') is visible in the list of documents within the 'Employee-Portal' section.

task_completion.description: Agent initiates the removal or unpublishing of the document from the Employee-Portal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox next to 'HR Policy 2024 Draft' is selected and a 'Delete' or 'Unpublish' button is clicked, or a confirmation dialog for deleting/unpublishing the document from the section is shown.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the document is removed from the Employee-Portal.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the 'HR-Internal' workspace to check the original document.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies the original document still exists in the HR-Internal workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document 'HR Policy 2024 Draft' is clearly visible in the list of documents within the 'HR-Internal' workspace.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo web GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Nuxeo Platform interface, not terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to simulate success.

integrity.description: Agent performs a sequence of logical UI clicks to achieve the goal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor movements, hover states, and UI transitions are consistent with genuine interaction with a web application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document is named 'HR-Policy-2024-Draft' (title: 'HR Policy 2024 Draft') and is located in the workspace '/default-domain/workspaces/HR-Internal'.
